rules: Bilingual hierarchy: Hindi is primary (larger, darker), English is secondary (smaller, lighter opacity, subtle underneath).

layouts.hero: Asymmetric split layout. Left side: Text content (Bilingual title, author, price, CTA). Right side: Large book cover placeholder image with generous padding. Use min-h-[80vh].
layouts.about: Editorial single-column layout. max-w-2xl centered. High line-height, sophisticated spacing. No boxes or borders.
layouts.signed_edition: Horizontal flex or CSS grid (1 md:2). Image of signature/pen on one side, details on the other. Use the accent blue color subtly for text or 1px border.
layouts.reservation_form: Minimalist grid form (Shadcn customized). 2 columns for smaller fields (name, phone, city, pin), 1 column for email/address. Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular submit button.
layouts.countdown_strip: A sticky bottom or subtle inline strip showing 'Only 1500 Copies Available' or a countdown. Minimal, not a full section.

signed_edition.title: Limited Edition
signed_edition.details: 1500 numbered signed copies. Signed with a blue gel pen by the author.

component_styles.buttons: Flat, pill-shaped (rounded-full) or sharp rectangular with 1px border. Background: #1A1A1A, Text: #FFFFFF. Hover: #333333. Use accent color only for primary CTA.
component_styles.inputs: Shadcn default but remove focus rings and use thin 1px border (#E5E2DC). Background transparent or white. Flat look.
component_styles.cards: Avoid typical cards. If necessary, use flat surfaces with 1px subtle borders (border-[#E5E2DC]) and no drop shadows.

book_cover_placeholder.description: Minimal close-up of a hardcover book. Use in the Hero section.

signature_detail.description: Close up of a fountain pen on paper. Use in the Signed Limited Edition details block.

visual_enhancers.spacing: Use 2x normal spacing. p-8, p-12, gap-12, py-24. Generous negative space.
visual_enhancers.motion: Very subtle fade-in-up (Framer Motion) on scroll. Micro-interactions on buttons.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E2DC for dividing sections instead of background color changes.

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORT GOOGLE SANS: Since Google Sans is a proprietary font, add a web font import or define the font-family specifically for 'Google Sans', falling back to 'sans-serif' if needed. Ensure to use standard Tailwind weights.
DO NOT use generic centered card grids.
Use Hindi text for the primary titles and English as a smaller, subtle subtitle right below it (e.g., text-sm text-secondary).
Keep the form strictly functional but beautiful: use Shadcn UI with customized, minimal styling.
No purple gradients, no AI-slop typical UI patterns.
The background should be a warm paper tone (#F8F7F4).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, but keep styling flat for this minimalist editorial look.
Do not center-align the app container (`.App { text-align: center; }`).
Use sonner for toast notifications (e.g., upon form submission with a success/thank you state).
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements for robust testing.
